reference: I want to conceive a baby now, as my husband and I just planned for a baby. I went to the doctor to get myself diagnosed. She advised me to do an ultrasound to find out if both ovaries are working properly. After the ultrasound, I found that I had mild free fluid in the right adnexa around the right ovary. What does it mean?
